channel.title: Embed on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Embed on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to add modern sitemap on blogger in 2021 for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-wGwxEGWG9vU/Ybd2thh2yNI/AAAAAAAAH20/Q3sDR0N2KT8-JtxtB5dgrQ9QWocP6PIcQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1639413427651828-0.png" alt=""> There are two types of Sitemap formats available for bloggers, first one is HTML sitemap which is essential and required for Google to crawl on your website and second modern sitemap which also use HTML but you have embed this site-map on your blogger page, once you do that it will automatically show all your posts and lables in one place in simplified manner. However, many bloggers don’t know about modern site-map format, so they only use HTML sitemap which is good but adding a
